description: A critical application container was accidentally deleted, leaving behind its data in an anonymous Docker volume. Locate the orphaned volume containing the file 'uploads/critical_manifest.json' among the dangling volumes. Start a new container named 'recovery-service' using the nginx:alpine image that mounts this specific volume to '/app/data' so that the file is accessible at '/app/data/uploads/critical_manifest.json'. Do not modify the file content.
